programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinchan nohara is a little boy who seems to do everything he can to annoy his parents and teachers (and succeeds wildly), but only means the best. he just tries to have a good time.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan is taken to a music school by Misae so he can learn music. However, the teacher of the institution leaves Misae upset.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When it begins to rain torrentially, Misae quickly moves the clothes to the first floor but forgets to close a tap which leads to flooding.

programme.title: Shin Chan

programme.title: Shin Chan

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae tries a new approach to deal with Shin-chan and correct his behaviour by appreciating his mischief instead of berating him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: On New Year's day, Shin-chan asks for a coin but Misae gifts him a ball instead. Later, Misae ends up breaking the ball and gives Shin-chan a coin.

programme.title: Shin Chan

programme.desc: Hiroshi takes the family on a fishing trip and his motion sickness makes him vomit. However, he later helps Shin-chan catch a large fish.

programme.title: Shin Chan

programme.title: Shin Chan

programme.title: Shin Chan

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Whilst Shin-chan and his friends are playing a detective game, they observe a handkerchief dropped by a woman and follow her to return it.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: The principal of the kindergarten tries to teach the children the art of calligraphy. However, Shin-chan creates a nuisance for everyone.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Misae exchanges Shin-chan's books for tissue papers, Shin-chan retrieves them and makes the promise to care better for them.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Hiroshi informs his family that he will be away on a business trip for a month, Misae is shocked. However, she later wishes him good luck.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When a cockroach infests the house, Misae asks Shin-chan to help her be rid of it. However, misadventures ensue and the cockroach remains.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae and Shin-chan travel to the station to meet with Hiroshi but they are unable to find him which leaves them frustrated. However, eventually when they see each other, they are happy.
